home.heroTitle: Discover Quality Products for Every Need
home.heroDescription: Browse our curated collection of premium products. From essentials to luxuries, we've got you covered.
home.featuredDescription: Discover our most popular items, hand-picked for quality and value.
home.categoryDescription: Find exactly what you're looking for by browsing our product categories.

cart.emptyCartMessage: Looks like you haven't added any products to your cart yet.

checkout.paypalMessage: You will be redirected to PayPal to complete your purchase securely.

orderConfirmation.thankYouMessage: Thank you for your purchase. Your order has been received and is being processed. You will receive a confirmation email shortly.
orderConfirmation.scanQrCode: Scan this QR code to track your order or share it with the recipient.

whatsapp.enterNumber: Enter your WhatsApp number to receive your order details, including a QR code for tracking.
whatsapp.qrCodeMessage: This QR code will be sent to your WhatsApp for order tracking.

footer.description: Your one-stop shop for all your needs. Quality products, competitive prices, and exceptional service.

currency.informalMarketExplanation: This rate reflects the informal market exchange in Cuba, which may differ significantly from official rates. Prices are adjusted based on real-time data from El Toque.
currency.inflationExplanation: This currency is experiencing high inflation. Prices are adjusted based on current inflation rates in Cuba.
currency.pricesAdjustedExplanation: All prices are converted using real-time informal market exchange rates from Cuba.
currency.ratesDisclaimer: Rates are updated regularly and may change throughout the day
currency.exchangeRateExplanation: The informal market rate is what you'll typically encounter in everyday transactions in Cuba. It's significantly higher than the official rate, reflecting the real purchasing power of foreign currencies in the local economy.
currency.simulatedDataDisclaimer: This chart shows simulated historical data based on current trends. For accurate historical data, please consult El Toque's official reports.
